overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse through a misty forest. The character travels through tall grass and trees before arriving at a campsite with people gathered around fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest with tall grass and scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: riding a horse steadily through tall grass, navigating between trees in the misty forest

entered.detail: dense green grass covering the forest floor with white wildflowers
tall trees with gnarled trunks shrouded in thick mist
moss-covered boulders scattered among the trees
thick fog permeating the forest background reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: The samurai rides through a dense, misty forest with tall grass swaying in the wind. Large rocks and twisted trees emerge from the fog as the horse moves steadily forward through the verdant undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path on forested hillside

events.description: horse transitions from tall grass onto a narrow dirt trail winding uphill
smoke from campfires and wooden structures become visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: riding uphill along a winding dirt path, approaching a distant camp visible through the mist

entered.detail: narrow brown dirt path cutting through the hillside
steep slope with exposed gray rocks and sparse vegetation
orange glow of fire visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a narrow dirt trail winding up a hillside. The forest opens slightly to reveal rocky slopes, and the orange glow of a distant campfire becomes visible through the mist ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: woodland camp with tents and cooking fires

events.description: enters a campsite with people gathered around fires and temporary shelters

agents.ego_description: riding into a camp and slowing down while passing people sitting around fires and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: sitting by the campfire, tending to the flames
standing near the path watching the rider approach

entered.detail: wooden wagon with supplies parked near the camp entrance
tall stone cliff face forming the backdrop of the camp
fabric shelters and awnings set up among the trees
wooden boxes and barrels stacked near the tents

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a woodland camp nestled against a rock wall, where people sit around burning campfires. The atmosphere shifts from isolated forest to a populated settlement with wooden carts, supply crates, and temporary shelters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, misty forest that gradually opens into a populated woodland camp. It begins with the samurai riding through verdant undergrowth and swaying tall grass, where twisted trees and large rocks emerge from a thick fog. As the horse moves forward, the terrain shifts to a narrow dirt trail winding up a hillside, causing the forest to open slightly and reveal the orange glow of a distant campfire through the mist. The scene then expands as the rider enters a settlement nestled against a rock wall, where the isolated atmosphere gives way to a camp filled with people, burning fires, wooden carts, and supply crates.
